entries.label:
Suggestion for Manager Photo Review:

Fill out "Job Details" and "Before / After Photos", skip "Store Manager Approval" and submit, to get the initial pdf report ("Sync after tapping Submit", "Show PDF after sync"), which will show all photos for easy review.
After review, re-open submission for editing (found in "Completed", next to "Home"), have Manager complete the "Store Manager Approval", and re-submit.
Rate the overall condition of the Service (Very Poor to Excellent)
Was all/large majority of the gum popped?
Are there any signs of striping/swirling on the concrete?

Were all of the trash cans/spill kits moved if possible? 
(if No, provide pictures)

Were there any misses or evidence of crews not following standard cleaning procedure? 
(if Yes, provide pictures)

Any noticeable wear/tear items or issues that should be brought to Wawa’s attention? 
(if Yes, provide pictures and comments)

Did the crew properly maintain site cleanliness prior to leaving? (ex: squeegee windows, splatter on pumps/pallard/beams/walls, trash pickup)
(provide pictures)
Please rate the performance of the Lewis Environmental crew that recently cleaned your store:
Any notes from the conversation with the MOD
